sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Announces a Securities Fraud Class Action Lawsuit Has Been Filed Against Snowflake Inc. (SNOW)
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Snowflake Inc. (SNOW) on behalf of investors who purchased Class A common stock between June 27, 2023, and February 28, 2024. The lawsuit alleges that Snowflake made misrepresentations regarding customer usage and product developments. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact Bernstein Liebhard LLP, with a lead plaintiff deadline of April 27, 2026.

feed.title: SKYH SEC Filings - Sky Harbour Group 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms

Recent filings indicate insider trading activity, quarterly financial results highlighting revenue growth alongside operating losses, and a new $200 million credit facility for hangar construction. It also details governance stability with re-elected directors and ratified auditors.

feed.title: Assessing Sun Life Financial (TSX:SLF) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: Sun Life Financial (TSX:SLF) has seen a 7% share price decline over the past month, despite a modest gain over three months and a 10.5% positive one-year return. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is 10.3% undervalued, with a fair value of CA$95.79 compared to its recent close of CA$85.95, attributing this to the growth of its asset management businesses. However, this optimistic outlook is subject to potential U.S. Dental headwinds and MFS fee pressure.

feed.title: Sprouts Farmers Market (SFM) SVP sells shares for RSU tax withholding

feed.title: Aptiv Announces Early Results and Upsizing of Cash Tender Offer
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC has announced the early results of its cash tender offer for several series of outstanding notes and has upsized the maximum aggregate consideration from $1.35 billion to $1.371 billion. The tender offer is contingent on the successful spin-off of Aptiv's Electrical Distribution Systems business into a new company, Versigent, and Aptiv receiving a special dividend of no less than $1.7 billion. The withdrawal deadline for tendered notes has passed, and the settlement date is expected to be April 7, 2026.

The change comes amidst other analyst revisions for Occidental Petroleum, with some upgrading and others adjusting price targets recently.

feed.title: Scholastic Q3 2026 Financial Strategy & Capital Return to Shareholders - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Scholastic Corporation's President and CEO, Peter Warwick, detailed the company's Q3 2026 financial strategy, which focused on long-term growth and shareholder value. A key initiative was the completion of a sale-leaseback transaction for its headquarters and a distribution facility, generating over $400 million in net proceeds. Following this, Scholastic nearly fully utilized a $150 million share repurchase authorization to return capital to shareholders, viewing its shares as a highly accretive investment.

feed.title: RTH Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:RTH

feed.title: A Look At ADP’s Valuation As Positive Guggenheim Initiation Meets Upgraded 2026 Growth Outlook
feed.summary: Guggenheim has initiated coverage on Automatic Data Processing (ADP) with a positive view, and management has raised its fiscal 2026 revenue and earnings outlook. Despite these positive developments, ADP's share price has seen recent declines, though it trades at a significant discount to analyst and intrinsic estimates, suggesting it could be an undervalued entry point. The narrative highlights ADP's strong cash flows and digital HR solutions, but also notes that its valuation is sensitive to trends in AI spending and employment.

feed.title: Transocean, Noble, COSL, Seadrill, and Valaris pinpointed as rig backlog powerhouses
feed.summary: Westwood Global Energy has identified Transocean, Noble, COSL, Seadrill, and Valaris as the leading offshore drilling companies for 2026's floating rig backlog based on current bookings. While 2025 saw a 25% drop in backlog days due to fewer contract awards from Brazil, 2026's already booked days are up 4% from 2025. South America, driven by Brazil, continues to dominate contracted days, primarily for drillships, with the North Sea second, focusing on semi-submersibles.

feed.title: Revolution Medicines (RVMD) COO pre-planned sale tied to RSU tax
feed.summary: Revolution Medicines, Inc. (RVMD) COO Margaret A. Horn reported selling 4,583 shares of common stock at $99.4804 per share. This transaction was pre-planned under a Rule 10b5-1 instruction letter to cover tax withholding obligations associated with the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs). After the sale, Horn directly holds 157,570 shares and also retains 73,050 RSUs.
